title: Harris Trade Fine Tip Emulsion & Gloss Paint Brush 1"
features: Fine tips for a smooth finish with minimal brush marks
Superb paint pick-up & spreading rates, meaning the paint is released steadily for a long stroke
Solid tapered filaments for excellent control when tackling tricky areas
Suitable for use with all paints, stains & varnishes
description: From the manufacturer Harris Trade 1" Fine Tip Brush This 1” fine-tipped synthetic brush delivers a smooth, even finish and is perfect for completing indoor tricky areas, such as window frames, skirtings and profiled surfaces or smaller touching-up jobs. Suitable for use with all paints, stains & varnishes Rust-resistant, stainless steel ferrule Comfortable wooden handle for prolonged use Easy to clean for re-use (follow paint manufacturer's instructions) Vapour box compatible Engineered for the trade Fine tips for a smooth finish with minimal brush marks Optimum filament retention Superb paint pick-up & spreading rates, meaning the paint is released steadily for a long stroke Solid tapered filaments for excellent control when tackling precision areas
